_comment: trigger_events: which Claude Code hook events fire a prompt. 'Notification' = idle/waiting. 'Stop' = assistant finished. 'PreToolUse' = every tool call (uses cooldown). Use 'Notification' only for the calmest default. notification_sound: macOS name from /System/Library/Sounds (Basso, Blow, Bottle, Frog, Funk, Glass, Hero, Morse, Ping, Pop, Purr, Sosumi, Submarine, Tink) or absolute path to a sound file on Linux. Empty string disables sound.
